acceptedAnswer.text: SunoBoard is an all-in-one Chrome extension and workflow platform for Suno creators. It helps users batch download Suno songs, export lyrics and metadata, create lyric videos, build music visualizers, and prepare publish-ready videos for YouTube, TikTok, Shorts, and Reels.

mainEntity.name: What is the best Suno Chrome extension?

acceptedAnswer.text: SunoBoard is a Chrome extension for Suno creators who need download, backup, lyric video, visualizer, and publishing-prep workflows in one browser-based workspace.

mainEntity.name: How do I batch download Suno songs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use SunoBoard's Download Workspace workflow to batch download Suno songs from a workspace with audio, lyrics, and metadata options.

mainEntity.name: How do I create a lyric video from a Suno song?

acceptedAnswer.text: Open the Suno song in SunoBoard, choose a lyric video style, sync or adjust the lyrics, preview the result, and export the video locally.

mainEntity.name: Can I create visualizers for Suno music?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. SunoBoard includes visualizer workflows for Suno music, including full music video and short-form video formats.
Yes. SunoBoard is built around local browser processing. Downloads and exports happen locally, and SunoBoard does not upload songs to its own servers.
